data.title: LAGENIO Enters the U.S. Market with K9 and Advances a New Era of AI Powered Kids Smart Watch
data.description: LAGENIO made its debut in the U.S. on April 27, 2026, unveiling the K9, a smartwatch designed for kids aged 5-12. This device is the first of its kind, utilizing AI technology and 4G capabilities. The K9 offers unique features such as AI-assisted learning and various family communication modes, setting a new standard for kids' smartwatches globally.

data.title: Deutsche Lufthansa AG: Release according to Article 40 (1) of the WpHG (the German Securities Trading Act) with the objective of Europe-wide distribution
data.description: Deutsche Lufthansa AG has issued a statement in compliance with Article 40 (1) of the German Securities Trading Act, aimed at distributing information across Europe.

data.title: Robinhood Q1 Earnings Preview: Will The Vlad Tenev-Led Brokerage Firm Feel The Pinch Of Crypto Bear Market?
data.description: Robinhood Markets Inc. is set to report its first-quarter earnings after the closing bell on Tuesday. Analysts project earnings per share to be $0.39, marking a 5.4% increase from the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is estimated to be $1.14 billion, showing a significant rise from $927 million in the previous year's quarter, although a decrease of about 11% from the prior quarter. A consensus of 27 analysts sets the price target for HOOD stock at $109.70, with the highest forecast at $170 by JMP Securities. Recent adjustments from JPMorgan and KeyBanc have notably lowered their price targets. For the full news story, please visit the Benzinga website.

data.title: Integrating into European Power Trading -- iSolarCloud Partners with Frank Energy to Build a New Smart Dispatch Ecosystem
data.description: In Hefei, China on April 27, 2026, iSolarCloud, the plant O&M platform of Sungrow, announced a strategic collaboration with Frank Energy, a leading energy service provider in Europe. The partnership aims to combine resources and expertise in the energy sector. iSolarCloud's website is www.isolarcloud.com.

data.title: Among the First: Sungrow's Full Portfolio ESS Products Complete NB Assessment Under EU Battery Regulation
data.description: In Hefei, China on April 27, 2026, Sungrow achieved compliance with EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 following a successful assessment by Notified Body (NB) TÜV Rheinland (NB No. 1008. This makes Sungrow the inaugural company worldwide to fulfill NB requirements.

data.title: 88 individuals accused in 12 crypto wrench incidents in France; some suspects linked to multiple cases.
data.description: Law enforcement agencies in France have been probing a series of wrench attacks. Investigations revealed that a number of the suspected perpetrators were linked to numerous incidents.

data.title: Hesai Group to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Tuesday, May 19, 2026
data.description: Investors are eagerly anticipating an earnings call set to take place at 8:00 AM Eastern Time on May 19, 2026. This event is expected to provide crucial insights into the financial performance of the company, with key figures such as revenue, profits, and potentially future projections being disclosed. Shareholders and analysts will be keenly observing the call for any significant developments that may impact the company's stock price and overall market position.
